decisions.title: /support page remains but gets cross-link to /find-help
decisions.rationale: /support is an established URL with backlinks. Rather than redirecting or removing, add a cross-link banner on /support pointing users to /find-help as the canonical helplines destination.

decisions.title: /find-help is the canonical helplines destination
decisions.rationale: All navigation links (Header, Footer, CrisisBanner) and cross-page references to helplines (#helplines anchor) will point to /find-help#helplines. The /support page will remain for broader support resources.

decisions.title: /mental-health-professionals remains as full directory linked from /find-help
decisions.rationale: The /find-help page shows a curated preview of featured professionals, with a CTA link to /mental-health-professionals for the full browsable directory. The existing [slug] detail route remains unchanged.

epics.name: Data fetching functions for Find Help page

tasks.description: Refactor getAllMentalHealthProfessionals() in cptsd-main/lib/getAllMentalHealthProfessionals.ts to accept optional filter params { featured?: boolean, verified?: boolean, limit?: number }. When featured: true is passed, add { featured: true } to the MongoDB query. When limit is provided, apply .limit(limit). The existing zero-argument call must continue to work identically (no filters, no limit). Do NOT create a separate function — extend the existing one to avoid duplicating the 30-line mapping block.
acceptance_criteria: getAllMentalHealthProfessionals() with no arguments returns the same result as before (all ACTIVE professionals, sorted featured:-1 verified:-1 name:1, no limit)
getAllMentalHealthProfessionals({ featured: true, limit: 6 }) returns only ACTIVE professionals with featured: true, limited to 6 results
getAllMentalHealthProfessionals({ featured: true }) without limit returns all featured professionals (no limit applied)
Return type remains MentalHealthProfessionalDoc[] regardless of filter params
When MONGODB_URI is not set or connection times out, function returns [] and logs a warning (matching existing error handling pattern)
The mapping block (lines 76-106) is not duplicated — a single mapping function is used

epics.name: Find Help page server component and sections

stories.name: Create /find-help route with server component page.tsx

tasks.description: Create the /find-help route directory and server component page at cptsd-main/app/find-help/page.tsx. Import getAllResources from '@/lib/dataActions' and ResourceType from '@cptsd/db'. Import getAllMentalHealthProfessionals from '@/lib/getAllMentalHealthProfessionals'. Fetch resources via getAllResources(), filter into helplines/therapyDirectories/NGOs using ResourceType enum (matching /support page pattern exactly). Fetch featured professionals via getAllMentalHealthProfessionals({ featured: true, limit: 6 }). Render HeroSection, CrisisSection, TherapistPreviewSection, GuidanceSection, DirectoriesSection passing data as props.
acceptance_criteria: File cptsd-main/app/find-help/page.tsx exists and exports a default async function FindHelpPage
Page exports 'export const dynamic = "force-dynamic"'
Page exports metadata with title 'Find Help' and descriptive SEO description
Page imports getAllResources from '@/lib/dataActions' (NOT from '@/lib/getAllResources')
Page imports ResourceType from '@cptsd/db' and uses ResourceType.HELPLINE, ResourceType.THERAPY_DIRECTORY, ResourceType.NGO to index the grouped resources object
Page calls getAllMentalHealthProfessionals({ featured: true, limit: 6 }) for therapist preview
Page renders 5 distinct sections: hero, crisis/helplines, therapist preview, guidance, directories
Page uses max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12 layout
Page renders without errors when data sources return empty arrays/objects

tasks.description: Create HeroSection component at cptsd-main/app/find-help/HeroSection.tsx. Server component with empathetic hero: large serif heading conveying hope and safety, supportive subheading, and disclaimer box matching existing pattern (bg-surface-container-high border-l-4 border-primary-container p-6 rounded-xl).
acceptance_criteria: File cptsd-main/app/find-help/HeroSection.tsx exists and exports default function
Renders h1 with empathetic, trauma-informed heading using font-serif class
Renders supportive subheading paragraph beneath h1
Renders disclaimer div using bg-surface-container-high border-l-4 border-primary-container p-6 rounded-xl
No 'use client' directive — is a server component
No 1px borders — boundaries via background color shifts only

tasks.description: Create CrisisSection component at cptsd-main/app/find-help/CrisisSection.tsx. Define and export a ResourceItem interface matching getAllResources() shape: { id: string, title: string, description: string, url: string | null, phone: string | null, region: string | null, languages: string[], tags: string[], isFeatured: boolean, featured: boolean }. Receives featured and other helplines as props. Renders: prominent emergency info box with 112 number, featured helplines as large cards with tel: links, other helplines in 2-column grid, graceful empty state. Has id='helplines' for anchor linking.
acceptance_criteria: File exists and exports default function CrisisSection
Exports ResourceItem interface with fields: id, title, description, url, phone, region, languages, tags, isFeatured, featured
Accepts props: { featuredHelplines: ResourceItem[], otherHelplines: ResourceItem[] }
Renders emergency info box with 112 number and hospital instructions
Featured helplines render as large cards with tel: links using the phone field
Other helplines render in grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 layout
Section has id='helplines' attribute for anchor linking
Empty state fallback when both arrays are empty
Cards use rounded-xl and bg-surface-container-lowest/high — no 1px borders

tasks.description: Create TherapistPreviewSection component at cptsd-main/app/find-help/TherapistPreviewSection.tsx. Import MentalHealthProfessionalDoc from '@/lib/getAllMentalHealthProfessionals'. Shows featured professionals in responsive grid. Each card links to /mental-health-professionals/${professional.slug} (confirmed route exists). CTA link to /mental-health-professionals.
acceptance_criteria: File exists and exports default function TherapistPreviewSection
Accepts props: { professionals: MentalHealthProfessionalDoc[] } using imported type
Renders cards in grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3
Cards show name, designation, location (city/state), up to 3 specializations, verified badge when professional.verified is true
Each card links to /mental-health-professionals/${professional.slug} using next/link
CTA link to /mental-health-professionals with gradient styling
Empty state fallback with link to full directory
Cards use rounded-xl bg-surface-container-lowest with ambient shadow

tasks.description: Create GuidanceSection component at cptsd-main/app/find-help/GuidanceSection.tsx. Static 'Not sure where to start?' section with navigation link cards to /start-here, /learn, /support.
acceptance_criteria: File exists and exports default function GuidanceSection
Renders h2 containing 'Not sure where to start?'
Renders 3 link cards to /start-here, /learn, and /support
Cards use bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl with ambient shadow and hover:bg-surface-variant
Uses Link from next/link for internal navigation

tasks.description: Create DirectoriesSection component at cptsd-main/app/find-help/DirectoriesSection.tsx. Import ResourceItem from CrisisSection. Receives therapy directories and NGOs as props. Renders resource cards with title, description, website link, phone number, and graceful empty state.
acceptance_criteria: File exists and exports default function DirectoriesSection
Accepts props: { therapyDirectories: ResourceItem[], ngos: ResourceItem[] } using ResourceItem from CrisisSection
Renders cards with title, description, website link (target=_blank rel='noopener noreferrer'), phone if available
Cards use bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl with ambient shadow
Empty state fallback when both arrays empty
Disclaimer note about not vetting services

tasks.description: Update Header.tsx: change 'Find Help' link href from /mental-health-professionals to /find-help in both desktop and mobile menus. Desktop link has trackNavigation — update to '/find-help'. Mobile link does NOT have trackNavigation — do NOT add it. /support links must remain unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Desktop 'Find Help' link href is '/find-help'
Desktop trackNavigation call updated to '/find-help'
Mobile 'Find Help' link href is '/find-help'
Mobile onClick still only calls setMobileMenuOpen(false) — no trackNavigation added
Link text remains 'Find Help' in both menus
/support link href remains '/support' in both desktop and mobile — unchanged
No other links changed

tasks.description: Update CrisisBanner.tsx: change link from /support#helplines to /find-help#helplines. Update link text to reference Find Help page.
acceptance_criteria: Link href is '/find-help#helplines'
Link text references 'Find Help page'
Styling unchanged
No other structural changes

tasks.description: Update Footer.tsx: change Helplines link href from /support#helplines to /find-help#helplines.
acceptance_criteria: Helplines Link href is '/find-help#helplines'
Helplines link text remains 'Helplines'
Footer still contains all original links: About, Community, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, logo
No other links changed

tasks.description: Update sitemap.ts to add /find-help with priority 0.9 and changeFrequency 'weekly'.
acceptance_criteria: sitemap.ts includes entry with url containing /find-help
Entry has changeFrequency: 'weekly' and priority: 0.9
Sitemap function still returns valid array with all existing entries intact

tasks.description: Add a cross-link banner near the top of /support page directing users to /find-help as the canonical helplines hub. Place after the disclaimer but before Emergency Note. Use bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl card with Link to /find-help.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-link banner rendered between disclaimer and emergency note
Contains next/link Link pointing to '/find-help'
Text communicates /find-help has helplines and directory in empathetic tone
Uses bg-surface-container-lowest rounded-xl styling
All existing /support page content remains intact

tasks.description: Audit and update all remaining /support#helplines references to /find-help#helplines. Known locations: start-here/page.tsx, about/page.tsx, privacy/page.tsx, terms/page.tsx. Also update resources/page.tsx /support reference to /find-help since it directs users to helplines.
acceptance_criteria: start-here/page.tsx: /support#helplines references updated to /find-help#helplines
about/page.tsx: /support#helplines updated to /find-help#helplines
privacy/page.tsx: /support#helplines updated to /find-help#helplines
terms/page.tsx: /support#helplines updated to /find-help#helplines
resources/page.tsx: /support link updated to /find-help with text referencing 'Find Help page'
No /support references are changed except those explicitly listed above
/support page itself not modified by this task

tasks.description: Run next build to verify entire cptsd-main project compiles successfully with all changes.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm build completes successfully (exit code 0)
Build output shows /find-help route compiled
/support page still exists in build output
/mental-health-professionals routes still exist in build output
No TypeScript errors related to new imports
